values.value: == CUSTOM LABEL XML FORMAT == File path: labels/CustomLabels.labels metadataType: CustomLabel memberName: LabelName (the API name of the label) IMPORTANT: ALL labels go into ONE file — labels/CustomLabels.labels If multiple labels are created/updated, merge ALL <labels> blocks into ONE file. <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomLabels xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <labels> <fullName>Label_API_Name</fullName> <language>en_US</language> <protected>false</protected> <shortDescription>Label_API_Name</shortDescription> <value>The label text value</value> </labels> </CustomLabels> RULES: - Element order MUST be: fullName, language, protected, shortDescription, value - shortDescription is REQUIRED — if not provided in the ticket, use the fullName value as default - NEVER omit shortDescription — Salesforce will reject the deploy without it - There is NO <masterLabel> element — do not include it - language defaults to en_US if not specified - protected defaults to false if not specified - For DELETING a label, use destructiveFiles with type CustomLabel and member = label API name - For UPDATING a label, generate the full <labels> block with all values (use existing values from org state for fields not being changed) - For TRANSLATING a label (adding a translation in another language), do NOT emit a CustomLabel file at all Translations go ONLY in translations/{language}.translation — never in labels/CustomLabels.labels - NEVER include the same <fullName> more than once inside a single CustomLabels file — Salesforce will reject with "Duplicate name" error
Custom Label XML format and rules
